strict_win_deltas.delta: P2 separates input parsing, event deduplication, calculation, and JSON error reporting into dedicated functions, while P1 invokes process.exit directly from parsing and validation helpers.

P2 uses Number.isSafeInteger for cent amounts and emits JSON errors for unreadable and malformed input separately, whereas P1 accepts unsafe integers and collapses file-read and parse failures into invalid_input.
P2 detects duplicate-ID conflicts before validating the deduplicated event set, while P1 validates each event before checking whether its ID conflicts with a prior event.

P2 adds reusable PayoutError and readJsonFile abstractions and tests malformed and unreadable input, while P1 duplicates direct process-exit behavior and includes two tests with the same conflicting-duplicate title.
